name: ducknng_start_server
arguments: name, listen, contexts, recv_max_bytes, session_idle_ms, tls_config_id[, ip_allowlist_json]
signature: ducknng_start_server(name, listen, contexts, recv_max_bytes, session_idle_ms, tls_config_id[, ip_allowlist_json])
description: Start a named ducknng NNG listener.

name: ducknng_start_http_server
arguments: name, listen, recv_max_bytes, session_idle_ms, tls_config_id[, ip_allowlist_json]
signature: ducknng_start_http_server(name, listen, recv_max_bytes, session_idle_ms, tls_config_id[, ip_allowlist_json])
description: Start a named ducknng HTTP or HTTPS frame carrier.

name: ducknng_stop_server
description: Stop a named ducknng service.

name: ducknng_list_servers
returns: TABLE(service_id UBIGINT, name VARCHAR, listen VARCHAR, contexts INTEGER, running BOOLEAN, sessions UBIGINT, active_pipes UBIGINT, max_open_sessions UBIGINT, max_active_pipes UBIGINT, inflight_requests UBIGINT, max_inflight_requests UBIGINT, max_sessions_per_peer_identity UBIGINT, tls_enabled BOOLEAN, tls_auth_mode INTEGER, peer_identity_required BOOLEAN, peer_allowlist_active BOOLEAN, ip_allowlist_active BOOLEAN, sql_authorizer_active BOOLEAN, peer_allowlist_count UBIGINT, ip_allowlist_count UBIGINT)
description: List registered ducknng services.

name: ducknng_register_exec_method
description: Register the built-in exec RPC method explicitly.

name: ducknng_set_method_auth
description: Set descriptor-level verified-peer-identity authorization for a registered RPC method.

name: ducknng_unregister_method
description: Unregister a method from the runtime registry.

name: ducknng_unregister_family
description: Unregister all methods in a family and return the number removed.

name: ducknng_list_methods
returns: TABLE(name VARCHAR, family VARCHAR, summary VARCHAR, transport_pattern VARCHAR, request_payload_format VARCHAR, response_payload_format VARCHAR, response_mode VARCHAR, request_schema_json VARCHAR, response_schema_json VARCHAR, requires_auth BOOLEAN, disabled BOOLEAN)
description: List the currently registered RPC methods in the runtime registry.

name: ducknng_read_monitor
returns: TABLE(seq UBIGINT, ts_ms UBIGINT, pipe_id UBIGINT, service_name VARCHAR, listen VARCHAR, transport_family VARCHAR, scheme VARCHAR, event VARCHAR, admitted BOOLEAN, reason VARCHAR, remote_addr VARCHAR, remote_ip VARCHAR, remote_port INTEGER, peer_identity VARCHAR)
description: Read the bounded per-service NNG pipe monitor event stream.

name: ducknng_monitor_status
returns: TABLE(service_name VARCHAR, event_capacity UBIGINT, event_count UBIGINT, oldest_seq UBIGINT, newest_seq UBIGINT, dropped_events UBIGINT, active_pipes UBIGINT, max_active_pipes UBIGINT)
description: Return pipe monitor ring status and active-pipe counters for a running service.

name: ducknng_list_pipes
returns: TABLE(pipe_id UBIGINT, opened_ms UBIGINT, service_name VARCHAR, listen VARCHAR, transport_family VARCHAR, scheme VARCHAR, remote_addr VARCHAR, remote_ip VARCHAR, remote_port INTEGER, peer_identity VARCHAR)
description: List currently active NNG pipes for a running service.

name: ducknng_open_socket
description: Open a client socket handle for a supported NNG protocol.

name: ducknng_dial_socket
description: Dial a URL using an opened socket handle.

name: ducknng_listen_socket
description: Bind a socket handle to a listen URL and start its NNG listener.

name: ducknng_close_socket
description: Close a client socket handle.

name: ducknng_send_socket_raw
description: Send one raw frame through an active socket handle.

name: ducknng_recv_socket_raw
description: Receive one raw frame from an active socket handle.

name: ducknng_subscribe_socket
description: Register a raw topic prefix on a sub socket.

name: ducknng_unsubscribe_socket
description: Remove a raw topic prefix from a sub socket.

name: ducknng_list_sockets
returns: TABLE(socket_id UBIGINT, protocol VARCHAR, url VARCHAR, open BOOLEAN, connected BOOLEAN, listening BOOLEAN, send_timeout_ms INTEGER, recv_timeout_ms INTEGER)
description: List client socket handles in the runtime.

name: ducknng_list_tls_configs
returns: TABLE(tls_config_id UBIGINT, source VARCHAR, enabled BOOLEAN, has_cert_key_file BOOLEAN, has_ca_file BOOLEAN, has_cert_pem BOOLEAN, has_key_pem BOOLEAN, has_ca_pem BOOLEAN, has_password BOOLEAN, auth_mode INTEGER, peer_allowlist_active BOOLEAN, peer_allowlist_count UBIGINT, peer_allowlist_json VARCHAR)
description: List registered TLS config handles and the kinds of material they contain.

name: ducknng_drop_tls_config
description: Remove a registered TLS config handle from the runtime.

name: ducknng_set_tls_peer_allowlist
description: Set the default exact peer-identity allowlist on a TLS config handle.

name: ducknng_set_service_peer_allowlist
description: Dynamically set the exact peer-identity allowlist for a running service.

name: ducknng_set_service_ip_allowlist
description: Dynamically set the IP/CIDR remote-address allowlist for a running service.

name: ducknng_set_service_limits
description: Set service resource limits.

name: ducknng_auth_context
returns: TABLE(phase VARCHAR, service_name VARCHAR, transport_family VARCHAR, scheme VARCHAR, listen VARCHAR, remote_addr VARCHAR, remote_ip VARCHAR, remote_port INTEGER, tls_verified BOOLEAN, peer_identity VARCHAR, peer_allowlist_active BOOLEAN, ip_allowlist_active BOOLEAN, sql_authorizer_active BOOLEAN, http_method VARCHAR, http_path VARCHAR, content_type VARCHAR, body_bytes UBIGINT, rpc_method VARCHAR, rpc_type VARCHAR, payload_bytes UBIGINT)
description: Expose the current request context to a SQL authorization callback.

name: ducknng_set_service_authorizer
description: Install or clear a service-level SQL authorization callback evaluated uniformly for framed RPC requests before method dispatch.

name: ducknng_self_signed_tls_config
description: Generate a self-signed development certificate and register it as a TLS config handle.

name: ducknng_tls_config_from_pem
description: Register a TLS config handle from in-memory PEM material.

name: ducknng_tls_config_from_files
description: Register a TLS config handle from file-backed certificate material.

name: ducknng_request
returns: TABLE(ok BOOLEAN, error VARCHAR, payload BLOB)
description: Perform a one-shot raw request and return a structured result row.

name: ducknng_request_socket
returns: TABLE(ok BOOLEAN, error VARCHAR, payload BLOB)
description: Perform a raw request through a previously dialed socket handle and return a structured result row.

name: ducknng_ncurl
arguments: url, method, headers_json, body, timeout_ms, tls_config_id
signature: ducknng_ncurl(url, method, headers_json, body, timeout_ms, tls_config_id)
returns: TABLE(ok BOOLEAN, status INTEGER, error VARCHAR, headers_json VARCHAR, body BLOB, body_text VARCHAR)
description: Perform one HTTP or HTTPS request and return an in-band result row.

name: ducknng_ncurl_aio
arguments: url, method, headers_json, body, timeout_ms, tls_config_id
signature: ducknng_ncurl_aio(url, method, headers_json, body, timeout_ms, tls_config_id)
description: Launch one asynchronous HTTP or HTTPS request and return a future-like aio handle id.

name: ducknng_ncurl_aio_collect
returns: TABLE(aio_id UBIGINT, ok BOOLEAN, status INTEGER, error VARCHAR, headers_json VARCHAR, body BLOB, body_text VARCHAR)
description: Wait for asynchronous ncurl handles and return one raw HTTP result row per newly collected terminal operation.

name: ducknng_list_codecs
returns: TABLE(provider VARCHAR, media_types VARCHAR, output VARCHAR, notes VARCHAR)
description: List the built-in body serialization/deserialization providers.

name: ducknng_parse_body
description: Parse one response/request body BLOB according to its content type.

name: ducknng_ncurl_table
arguments: url, method, headers_json, body, timeout_ms, tls_config_id
signature: ducknng_ncurl_table(url, method, headers_json, body, timeout_ms, tls_config_id)
description: Perform one HTTP or HTTPS request and parse a successful response body into a DuckDB table using the built-in body codec providers.

name: ducknng_request_raw_aio
description: Launch one raw req/rep roundtrip asynchronously and return a future-like aio handle id.

name: ducknng_get_rpc_manifest_raw_aio
description: Launch one asynchronous manifest RPC request and return an aio handle id for the raw reply frame.

name: ducknng_run_rpc_raw_aio
description: Launch one asynchronous metadata-only exec RPC request and return an aio handle id for the raw reply frame.

name: ducknng_request_socket_raw_aio
description: Launch one raw req/rep roundtrip asynchronously on an existing req socket handle and return an aio handle id.

name: ducknng_send_socket_raw_aio
description: Launch one raw socket send asynchronously and return an aio handle id.

name: ducknng_recv_socket_raw_aio
description: Launch one raw socket receive asynchronously and return an aio handle id.

name: ducknng_aio_ready
description: Return whether an aio handle has reached a terminal state.

name: ducknng_aio_status
returns: TABLE(aio_id UBIGINT, exists BOOLEAN, kind VARCHAR, state VARCHAR, phase VARCHAR, terminal BOOLEAN, send_done BOOLEAN, send_ok BOOLEAN, recv_done BOOLEAN, recv_ok BOOLEAN, has_reply_frame BOOLEAN, error VARCHAR)
description: Inspect the current or terminal status of one aio handle, including send-phase and recv-phase completion.

name: ducknng_aio_collect
returns: TABLE(aio_id UBIGINT, ok BOOLEAN, error VARCHAR, frame BLOB)
description: Wait for any requested aio handles to finish and return one row per newly collected terminal result.

name: ducknng_aio_cancel
description: Request cancellation of a pending aio handle.

name: ducknng_aio_drop
description: Release a terminal aio handle from the runtime registry.

name: ducknng_get_rpc_manifest
returns: TABLE(ok BOOLEAN, error VARCHAR, manifest VARCHAR)
description: Request the RPC manifest and return a structured result row.

name: ducknng_get_rpc_manifest_raw
description: Request the RPC manifest and return the raw reply frame as BLOB.

name: ducknng_run_rpc
returns: TABLE(ok BOOLEAN, error VARCHAR, rows_changed UBIGINT, statement_type INTEGER, result_type INTEGER)
description: Execute a metadata-oriented RPC call and return a structured result row.

name: ducknng_run_rpc_raw
description: Execute the exec RPC and return the raw reply frame as BLOB.

name: ducknng_query_rpc
description: Execute a row-returning RPC query and expose the unary Arrow IPC row reply as a DuckDB table.

name: ducknng_open_query
returns: TABLE(ok BOOLEAN, error VARCHAR, session_id UBIGINT, session_token VARCHAR, state VARCHAR, next_method VARCHAR, control_json VARCHAR, idle_timeout_ms UBIGINT)
description: Open a server-side query session and return the JSON control metadata as a structured row.

name: ducknng_fetch_query
arguments: url, session_id, session_token, batch_rows, batch_bytes, tls_config_id
signature: ducknng_fetch_query(url, session_id, session_token, batch_rows, batch_bytes, tls_config_id)
returns: TABLE(ok BOOLEAN, error VARCHAR, session_id UBIGINT, session_token VARCHAR, state VARCHAR, next_method VARCHAR, control_json VARCHAR, idle_timeout_ms UBIGINT, payload BLOB, end_of_stream BOOLEAN)
description: Fetch the next session reply and return either JSON control metadata or an Arrow IPC batch payload.

name: ducknng_close_query
returns: TABLE(ok BOOLEAN, error VARCHAR, session_id UBIGINT, session_token VARCHAR, state VARCHAR, next_method VARCHAR, control_json VARCHAR, idle_timeout_ms UBIGINT)
description: Close a server-side query session and return the JSON control metadata as a structured row.

name: ducknng_cancel_query
returns: TABLE(ok BOOLEAN, error VARCHAR, session_id UBIGINT, session_token VARCHAR, state VARCHAR, next_method VARCHAR, control_json VARCHAR, idle_timeout_ms UBIGINT)
description: Request cancellation for a server-side query session and return the JSON control metadata as a structured row.

name: ducknng_request_raw
description: Perform a one-shot raw request and return the raw reply frame bytes.

name: ducknng_request_socket_raw
description: Perform a raw request through a dialed socket handle and return the raw reply frame bytes.

name: ducknng_decode_frame
returns: TABLE(ok BOOLEAN, error VARCHAR, version UTINYINT, type UTINYINT, flags UINTEGER, type_name VARCHAR, name VARCHAR, payload BLOB, payload_text VARCHAR)
description: Decode a raw ducknng frame into envelope fields and extracted payload columns.
